metadata.source: Grand Grimoire of Cthulhu Mythos Magic
metadata.notes: Spells compiled from NotebookLM extraction of the Grand Grimoire. Variable costs are noted with logic explanations. Categories use full names derived from shorthand codes.

variable_cost_rules.notes: Many spells use variable MP or POW. The following rules govern common variable formulas.
variable_cost_rules.call_deity: Total MP sacrificed by all participants = % chance deity manifests (e.g., 25 MP = 25% chance).
variable_cost_rules.banish_byatis: MP spent x 5 = percentile value for opposed roll vs. Byatis POW 160.
variable_cost_rules.exile_eihort: MP spent x 5 = percentile value for opposed roll vs. Eihort POW 150.
variable_cost_rules.balk_brood: MP x 5 = success chance vs. days elapsed x 5.
variable_cost_rules.seal_of_isis: MP x 5 = ward strength for attacker's opposed POW roll.
variable_cost_rules.alter_weather: Every 10 MP = one level of weather change.
variable_cost_rules.fist_of_yog_sothoth: Each MP = 2D10 STR of invisible force.
variable_cost_rules.venomous_glance: 5 MP = Mild (1D10 dmg); 10 MP = Strong (2D10 dmg); 20 MP = Lethal (4D10 dmg).
variable_cost_rules.control_elements: Base 8 MP; each additional MP adds +10 STR to the element (starts at 125 STR).
variable_cost_rules.look_to_the_future: 1 year passes per 5 POW expended by participants.
variable_cost_rules.enchanting_items: Each 1 POW invested = +2% bonus to specific summoning or binding rolls.
variable_cost_rules.dismiss_deity: 1 MP per 25 POW of deity opens the way (5% base); each additional MP from group = +5%.
variable_cost_rules.dismiss_spirit: Assistants who know the spell can spend 10 MP to grant caster a bonus die on opposed POW roll.
variable_cost_rules.animate_flesh_thing: 1 MP per 5 SIZ of flesh being animated.

spells.name: Accursed Eye
spells.effect: Allows the caster to see out of another's eye socket after a gruesome ritual growth process.
requirements: Small piece of unwholesome flesh from caster or another victim to grow new eye

spells.name: Activation
spells.cost_mp_formula: Each MP spent = +5% chance of success. Targeting others requires an opposed POW roll.
spells.effect: Uses an attuned crystal to target self or others; success for others requires an opposed POW roll.
requirements: A specifically attuned crystal (prepared via the Attune Crystal spell)

spells.name: Alter Weather
spells.cost_mp_formula: Every 10 MP sacrificed = one level of weather change.
spells.effect: Moderates or exacerbates weather; every 10 magic points sacrificed effects one level of change.
requirements: Song-like chant for three minutes per level of change
Large groups can cast together to increase meteorological effect

spells.name: Anathema
spells.effect: Dispel magical spells being maintained by magic points within earshot; can force back summoned beings.

spells.name: Animate Flesh Thing
spells.cost_mp_formula: 1 MP per 5 SIZ of the flesh being animated.
spells.effect: Transforms dead skin and flesh into a thick, fleshy semi-liquid that can capture or attack.
requirements: A carcass or lumps of flesh and organs gathered for the purpose

spells.name: Apportion Ka
spells.effect: Transfers a portion of life essence into a vital organ that is then removed and hidden, granting invulnerability.
requirements: One of the caster's vital organs must be removed and hidden

spells.name: Attract Fish
alt_names: Gather the Abundance of the Sea
spells.effect: Summons 1D100 local fish to the caster's location within one hour using blood-mixed bait.

spells.name: Attune Crystal
spells.cost_pow_formula: Permanently invests POW into a high-quality crystal.
spells.effect: Permanently invests POW into a high-quality crystal for use with the Activation spell.

spells.name: Awake Abhoth
alt_names: Threefold Ritual of Awakening the Feaster
spells.effect: Awakens a comatose, partially manifested version of the Great Old One Abhoth via three proving rituals.
requirements: Three proving rituals demonstrating faithfulness to Abhoth

spells.name: Awaken the Beast
spells.effect: Permanently transforms a human into an animal native to the caster's region over 1D6+2 days.

spells.name: Awaken the Inner Light
spells.effect: A strict monthly regimen of fasting and meditation to increase magical potential (POW). Extreme Success increases POW by 5.
requirements: Lunar month of strict diet and fasting
Two hours daily meditation inside a magical circle

spells.name: Bait Humans
spells.effect: Compels humans toward a specific location or action.

spells.name: Balk Brood
spells.cost_mp_formula: MP x 5 = success chance in opposed roll vs. number of days elapsed x 5.
spells.effect: Prevents a brood creature from manifesting or acting.

spells.name: Baneful Dust of Hermes Trismegistus
spells.effect: Creates a golden dust that causes damage to creatures of non-terrestrial origin.

spells.name: Banish Byatis
spells.cost_mp_formula: MP spent x 5 = percentile value for opposed roll vs. Byatis' POW of 160.
spells.effect: Forces the Great Old One Byatis back into its subterranean prison.
requirements: A statue of Byatis grants a success bonus

spells.name: Banish Thy Name
spells.cost_mp_formula: 12 MP per night; spell operates over multiple nights.
spells.effect: Uses target's True Name to banish them from existence over multiple nights of chanting.
requirements: Specially blessed silk paper prepared on a new moon

spells.name: Banishment of Yde Etad
spells.effect: Banishes a specific entity known as Yde Etad.

spells.name: Barrier of Pain
spells.cost_mp_formula: 5 MP per day of maintenance.
spells.effect: Creates an invisible 500-foot diameter barrier that traps those aware of the caster. Requires daily maintenance.
requirements: Centered on a fixed epicenter such as a building foundation or large stone
Daily maintenance cost of 5 MP and 1D10 SAN

spells.name: Bat Form
spells.effect: Caster assumes the form and capabilities of a bat until the next sunrise.

spells.name: Become Spectral
spells.cost_mp_formula: 1 MP per round of spectral state.
spells.effect: Shifts the caster and possessions into 'Limbo,' making them invisible to mundane senses. Duration limited by MP invested.

spells.name: Bestow Glimpse of Truth
spells.effect: Forces a target to perceive a terrifying cosmic truth.

spells.name: Bind Animal
spells.effect: Directs a specific animal type to perform a limited series of actions.

spells.name: Bind Enemy
spells.effect: Magically binds an enemy, limiting their actions or free will.

spells.name: Bind Soul
spells.effect: Seals a target's magic points into an effigy containing their hair, nails, or blood.
requirements: Hair, nails, or blood from the target

spells.name: Black Box
spells.effect: Mutates a target within 100 yards into a horrifying, half-melted creature.

spells.name: Bless
spells.effect: Grants a general blessing to a target or location.

spells.name: Bless Blade
alt_names: Imbue Might of the Elder Ones
spells.effect: Imbues an elemental metal blade with the ability to damage supernatural entities.

spells.name: Blessing of Bast
spells.effect: Heals 1D6 hit points and restores 1D6 Sanity points for those worthy of the goddess Bast.
requirements: Target must be worthy of Bast's favor

spells.name: Blight/Bless Crop
spells.effect: Causes one acre of vegetation to either wither and die or grow with extreme vigor.

spells.name: Bliss
spells.cost_mp_formula: Minimum 3 MP; higher investment provides greater protection.
spells.effect: Provides a mental refuge to protect a target from Sanity loss; leaves the target immobile.

spells.name: Bloat
spells.effect: Causes a target to swell grotesquely.

spells.name: Blunt the Weapon
spells.effect: Causes slashing and piercing weapons to deal only half damage to the target for 6 rounds.

spells.name: Breath of Pazzuzu
spells.effect: Unleashes a devastating breath weapon against a target.

spells.name: Breath of the Deep
spells.effect: Fills the target's lungs with seawater, causing drowning and 1D8 damage per round.

spells.name: Breath of the Kappa
spells.effect: Bestows the target with the ability to breathe underwater for a limited time.

spells.name: Brew Space-Mead (II)
spells.cost_mp_formula: 20 MP per dose brewed.
spells.effect: Enables wooden boat hulls to sail the winds of outer space (Dreamlands variant).
requirements: 7 or more days of preparation per dose

spells.name: Call Arwassa
spells.cost_mp_formula: Total MP from all participants = % chance deity manifests.
spells.effect: Summons the Great Old One Arwassa.

spells.name: Call Cthugha
spells.cost_mp_formula: Total MP from all participants = % chance deity manifests.
spells.effect: Summons the Great Old One Cthugha.

spells.name: Call El Negro
spells.cost_mp_formula: Total MP from all participants = % chance deity manifests.
spells.effect: Summons the entity known as El Negro.

spells.name: Call Ghatanothoa
spells.cost_mp_formula: Total MP from all participants = % chance deity manifests.
spells.effect: Summons the Great Old One Ghatanothoa.

spells.name: Call Hastur
spells.cost_mp_formula: Total MP from all participants = % chance deity manifests.
spells.effect: Summons the Great Old One Hastur.
requirements: Aldebaran must be above the horizon

spells.name: Call Iod
spells.cost_mp_formula: Total MP from all participants = % chance deity manifests.
spells.effect: Summons the entity Iod.

spells.name: Call Lightning
spells.effect: Causes a lightning bolt dealing 6D6 damage to strike a target within eyesight during a storm.
requirements: An active storm must be present

spells.name: Call Nyogtha
spells.cost_mp_formula: Total MP from all participants = % chance deity manifests.
spells.effect: Summons the Great Old One Nyogtha.

spells.name: Call Ossadogowah
spells.cost_mp_formula: Total MP from all participants = % chance deity manifests.
spells.effect: Summons the entity Ossadogowah.
requirements: Algol (the Demon Star) must be visible

spells.name: Call Rlim Shaikorth
spells.cost_mp_formula: Total MP from all participants = % chance deity manifests.
spells.effect: Summons the Great Old One Rlim Shaikorth.

spells.name: Call The Beast
spells.cost_mp_formula: Total MP from all participants = % chance deity manifests.
spells.effect: Summons a powerful bestial entity.

spells.name: Call The Black
spells.effect: Summons the living blood of Yibb-Tstll to suffocate and kill a single target.

spells.name: Call Yibb-Tstll
spells.cost_mp_formula: Total MP from all participants = % chance deity manifests.
spells.effect: Summons the Great Old One Yibb-Tstll.
requirements: Midnight on the first day of the year

spells.name: Call Yig
spells.cost_mp_formula: Total MP from all participants = % chance deity manifests.
spells.effect: Summons the Great Old One Yig.

spells.name: Call Yog-Sothoth
spells.cost_mp_formula: Total MP from all participants = % chance deity manifests.
spells.effect: Summons the Outer God Yog-Sothoth.
requirements: Specially constructed stone tower at least 10 yards high

spells.name: Call Zombie
spells.effect: Summons or reanimates a zombie servant.

spells.name: Candle Communication
spells.cost_mp_formula: 5 MP base; higher cost for greater distance (up to 1,000 miles).
spells.effect: Two sentient beings communicate by voice at a distance using candles (up to 1,000 miles).

spells.name: Cascades of Florin
spells.cost_pow_formula: Every 5 POW expended causes every drenched being to lose 1D6 magic points.
spells.effect: Produces torrents of golden liquid that sweep away opposition in an area. Each victim loses 1D6 MP per 5 POW spent.

spells.name: Cast Out Shan
spells.effect: Banishes the insect-like Shan (Insects from Shaggai) from a host or area.

spells.name: Cast Out The Devil
spells.effect: Frees a target from possession by an alien entity via an opposed POW roll.

spells.name: Casting the Runes
spells.effect: Inscribes a parchment with runes that bring natural-appearing but torturous death to a target.

spells.name: Cause Disease
spells.cost_mp_formula: 8 MP base; higher investment creates more severe disease.
spells.effect: Afflicts target with a feverish illness, draining STR, CON, and DEX over several days.

spells.name: Circle of Nausea
spells.effect: Creates a protective circle using four enchanted opals that causes pain and nausea to approaching humans.

spells.name: Cleansing Flame of Vorvadoss
spells.cost_mp_formula: Higher MP investment = greater chance of driving entities away.
spells.effect: Potent flash of prismatic light that drives extra-dimensional entities back to their own dimension.

spells.name: Cleansing Ritual
spells.effect: Cleanses a person, object, or location of harmful spiritual contamination.

spells.name: Cloud Memory
spells.cost_mp_formula: Rolled randomly; opposed POW roll determines success.
spells.effect: Blocks the target's ability to remember a specific event via an opposed POW roll.

spells.name: Clutch of Nyogtha
spells.cost_mp_formula: 1 MP minimum; concentration maintained to continue crushing 1D3 damage per round.
spells.effect: Paralyzes the target and crushes their heart for 1D3 damage per round of concentration.

spells.name: Command Animal
spells.effect: Commands a specific animal species to obey a single command.

spells.name: Command Plants
spells.cost_mp_formula: 2 MP minimum; higher investment affects more or larger plants.
spells.effect: Manipulates plants (roots, vines, branches) to grasp or entangle a target.

spells.name: Concentric Rings of the Worm
spells.effect: Creates a barrier of concentric rings that blocks physical attacks.

spells.name: Contact Abhoth
spells.effect: Dream contact with the god Abhoth; failed POW roll results in a permanent coma.

spells.name: Contact Formless Spawn
spells.effect: Establishes communication with a Formless Spawn near a temple of Tsathoggua or the abyss of N'Kai.
requirements: Near a temple of Tsathoggua or the abyss of N'Kai

spells.name: Contact Ghoul
spells.effect: Establishes communication with a ghoul near old moonlit graveyards or crypts.
requirements: Near old moonlit graveyards or crypts

spells.name: Contact Gnoph-Keh
spells.effect: Establishes communication with a Gnoph-Keh in frozen wastes using an ice effigy and singing.

spells.name: Contact Hound of Tindalos
spells.effect: Communication via geometric formulae in a space with an angle less than 120 degrees.
requirements: Space with angle less than 120 degrees

spells.name: Contact Human (Mi-Go)
spells.effect: Mi-go mentally communicate with previously hypnotized human servants.
requirements: Target must have been previously hypnotized by the Mi-Go

spells.name: Contact Star-Spawn of Cthulhu
spells.effect: Establishes communication with a Star-Spawn of Cthulhu at the ocean shore or star-spawn sleeping spots.
requirements: Ocean shore or star-spawn sleeping location

spells.name: Control Elements
spells.cost_mp_formula: 8 MP base; element starts with 125 STR; each additional MP adds +10 STR. One element per casting.
spells.effect: Enables powerful control over earth, wind, fire, or water. One element per casting.

spells.name: Coyote Dust
spells.effect: Creates 1D6 doses of herb-based dust that promotes deep slumber in those nearby.

spells.name: Create Gate Window
spells.effect: Version of the Gate spell kept open by the will of a deity or powerful sorcerer.
requirements: Requires a deity or powerful sorcerer to maintain

spells.name: Create Mist of R'lyeh
spells.effect: Causes a dense mist to obscure vision in a 10x10x15 foot volume for 1D6+4 rounds.

spells.name: Create Storm
spells.effect: Summons localized natural heavy winds, rain, or snow for 10+1D100 minutes.

spells.name: Creeping Loss
spells.effect: A sauce made from human ganglia creates enough for four people to consume, with harmful effects.

spells.name: Curse of Apophis
spells.effect: Misty veil blots out all celestial light in a 100-yard radius for 30 minutes.

spells.name: Curse of Chaugnar Faugn
spells.cost_mp_formula: 1 MP per hour; maintained weekly with chanting.
spells.effect: Causes a target to be devoured by the god Chaugnar Faugn; requires a flesh fragment and weekly chanting.

spells.name: Curse of Darkness
spells.cost_pow_formula: Every POW sacrificed by the circle increases the chance of success by 2 percentiles.
spells.effect: Group chant forces an extra-dimensional being to return to its home plane.

spells.name: Curse of the Stone
spells.effect: Uses an ensorcelled stone tablet to cause horrible hallucinations in a target.

spells.name: Death Spell
spells.effect: Target within 10 yards progressively blisters and then bursts into flames.

spells.name: Death's Breath
spells.cost_mp_formula: Variable; higher MP fills a larger area with shadowy mist.
spells.effect: Caster exhales dense shadowy mist that fills an area and douses small lights.

spells.name: Defy Gravity
spells.effect: Permits the caster to float or be propelled vertically or horizontally.

spells.name: Detect Enchantment
spells.effect: Detects harmful enchantments (curses, hexes) on humans, animals, or crops.

spells.name: Dismiss Spirit
spells.cost_mp_formula: Assistants who know the spell can spend 10 MP to grant the caster a bonus die on the opposed POW roll.
spells.effect: Drives out spirits via an opposed POW roll; can be supported by assistants spending 10 MP each for a bonus die.

spells.name: Dissolve Skeleton
spells.effect: Target's bones vanish, collapsing them into quivering flesh.

spells.name: Divination
spells.cost_mp_formula: Variable investment; uses assistants and a water bowl to beseech Yog-Sothoth.
spells.effect: Uses assistants, blood, and a water bowl to beseech Yog-Sothoth for a glimpse of the future.
requirements: 20-foot circle of salt or chalk with inlaid pentagram

spells.name: Dread Curse of Azathoth
spells.effect: Repeating the secret name of Azathoth drains 3D6 POW from a target.

spells.name: Dust of Suleiman
spells.effect: Grey-green powder that harms unnatural beings.

spells.name: Earthly Serenity
spells.effect: Inhibits pain and brings a serene state of mind for one hour.

spells.name: Elder Sign, The
spells.effect: Creates or activates a seal that blocks paths to Great Old Ones and their minions.

spells.name: Elysian Grace
spells.effect: Target is immobilized for 1D6 hours; bodily functions slow to a near-stop.

spells.name: Emerald Darts of Ptath
spells.cost_mp_formula: 4 MP base; additional MP creates more darts.
spells.effect: Creates light darts dealing 1D3 damage each while ignoring armor.

spells.name: Empty Mind
spells.effect: Fortifies the mind; doubles POW value against a single mental attack.
requirements: Over one year of mental training and discipline

spells.name: Enchant Gris-Gris
spells.effect: Leather pouch grants skill enhancement for up to 1D100+1 days.

spells.name: Enchant Serum
spells.effect: Accelerates pharmacological mixtures' speed of effect by a factor of ten.

spells.name: Enchant Stone Tablet
spells.effect: Creates an enchanted stone tablet.

spells.name: Exaltation
spells.cost_mp_formula: 12 MP base; higher investment restores more temporary Sanity.
spells.effect: Floods the target with well-being, restoring temporary Sanity points.

spells.name: Extend Life
spells.effect: Ritual used by wizards to attain longevity through a horrific bargain.

spells.name: Final Feast
spells.cost_mp_formula: Variable depending on degree of soul consumption or brainwashing attempted.
spells.effect: Allows a caster to sway, brainwash, or consume the soul of a target.

spells.name: Find Serpent Folk
spells.effect: Tells the direction and distance to the nearest true Serpent Person. (Serpent People only.)
requirements: Caster must be a Serpent Person

spells.name: Fire Dance
spells.cost_mp_formula: Variable; caster summons Jack O' Flames, whose power scales with MP invested.
spells.effect: Caster summons Jack O' Flames to strike a target with fiery force.

spells.name: Fist of Yog-Sothoth
spells.cost_mp_formula: Each MP invested = 2D10 STR of invisible force delivered to the target.
spells.effect: Hits a target with massive invisible force (2D10 STR per MP invested).

spells.name: Flight
spells.effect: Ointment allows flight (MOV 10) for 1D6 hours.
requirements: Ointment rendered from unbaptized child fat

spells.name: Food of Life
spells.effect: Unholy cannibalistic feast extends life by 1 week per 5 SIZ consumed.
requirements: Human flesh for the feast (1 week extension per 5 SIZ consumed)

spells.name: Good Thief Water
spells.effect: Infusion causes thieves to feel inexplicable aversion and nausea when near the warded location or person.

spells.name: Grasp of Cthulhu
spells.cost_mp_formula: 2D6 MP per minute sustained; targets within 10 yards are immobilized and lose STR.
spells.effect: Immobilizes targets within 10 yards with crushing pressure, robbing them of STR.

spells.name: Green Decay
spells.effect: Curse that turns a target into a pile of mold following the gift of a leaf.

spells.name: Heart's Courage
spells.effect: Deity runes protect an area against those with Mythos knowledge.
requirements: Deity runes inscribed in the protected area

spells.name: Human Shrub
spells.effect: Transforms a living human into a rooted plant/human hybrid.

spells.name: Hunger of Kazan
spells.effect: Causes fissures in the ground to erupt with molten lava and steam.

spells.name: Ill Luck
spells.effect: Causes the target to suffer a penalty die on all Luck rolls for 24 hours.

spells.name: Immortality
spells.effect: Prolongs life indefinitely using a prepared copper bowl and heating a corpse.

spells.name: Impeccable Throw
spells.effect: Guides a thrown object to land exactly where the caster desires within 50 feet.

spells.name: Instant Enlightenment
spells.effect: Imparts cosmic truth; target loses 1D6 SAN but gains 1D3 Cthulhu Mythos.

spells.name: Journey to the Other Side
spells.effect: Caster enters a trance to send their spirit to another plane of existence.
requirements: A full day of trance state

spells.name: Lame/Heal Animal
spells.effect: Causes inflammation and suffering, or vigor and healing, in a touched horse or cow.

spells.name: Lassitude of Phein
spells.effect: Target falls into a deep, natural slumber.

spells.name: Lift Veil
spells.effect: Allows the caster to move a floating target yard by yard through the air.

spells.name: Living Clothes
spells.effect: Target's clothes turn to slime-flesh and crush them.

spells.name: Maggots
spells.effect: Touched target's skin is consumed by thousands of rapidly growing larvae.

spells.name: Malenkamon's Impressive Bolt
spells.effect: Jad-flare energy deals damage and knocks the target unconscious.

spells.name: Mandrake
spells.effect: Creates a faceless, semi-living mandrake root simulacrum.

spells.name: Mind Dance
spells.cost_mp_formula: Variable based on severity of madness being treated.
spells.effect: Restores sanity to a mad person via ritual sacrifice and brain consumption.

spells.name: Mind Exchange
spells.cost_mp_formula: Variable depending on bond strength between caster and target.
spells.effect: Caster trades minds with an emotionally bonded target.
requirements: Emotional bond between caster and target

spells.name: Mindblast
spells.effect: Terrible mental assault causes 5 SAN loss and temporary insanity in the target.

spells.name: Minim
spells.cost_mp_formula: Variable; each casting causes permanent loss of SIZ, CON, and STR.
spells.effect: Contracting rings cause permanent loss of SIZ, CON, and STR.

spells.name: Pact of Quachil Uttaus
spells.cost_mp_formula: 5D10 MP (rolled randomly); caster's spine becomes permanently deformed.
spells.effect: Caster makes a bargain with Quachil Uttaus for protection from death; spine becomes deformed as a permanent mark.

spells.name: Passing Unseen
spells.cost_mp_formula: 10 MP base; additional MP extends duration. Target must keep chanting.
spells.effect: Causes the target to become temporarily invisible while chanting.

spells.name: Perceive Text
spells.effect: Read text in pitch darkness or while blind via magical touch.

spells.name: Pipes of Madness
spells.effect: Playing a weird melody on bone pipes risks insanity for all listeners.

spells.name: Powder of Ibn-Ghazi
spells.effect: Compounded powder makes magically invisible things visible.

spells.name: Power Chant
spells.effect: Sacrifice 5 POW to temporarily double magic points until the next sun change.

spells.name: Power Drain
spells.effect: Leeches 1D6 magic points from target; failed POW roll drains the caster instead.

spells.name: Power of Nyambe
spells.effect: Ritual calls on the gods to receive 2D6 non-regenerating magic points.

spells.name: Quicken
spells.effect: Increases caster's MOV by 2 and DEX by 10 for 4 rounds.

spells.name: Quicken Fog-Spawn
spells.effect: Rapidly grows an invisible 'Gish-rla' entity in dense fog to command.

spells.name: Reanimation
spells.effect: Creates a self-aware zombie; requires washing a human corpse's tongue.
requirements: Intestines of a zombie (for related Create Bad-Corpse Dust spell)

spells.name: Return Servitor
spells.effect: Interferes with a binding to compel a Mythos creature to attack its own summoner.

spells.name: Seal of Isis
spells.cost_mp_formula: MP invested x 5 = ward strength; attacker must succeed in opposed POW roll against this value.
spells.effect: Protects inanimate objects in a 50-foot cube against magical attacks.

spells.name: Seal Pit
spells.cost_mp_formula: Each crystal used boosts success chance for dismissing Hastur.
spells.effect: Uses crystals to boost success chance for dismissing Hastur.

spells.name: Sever the Affable Bonds
spells.effect: Curse to disrupt a target's life; requires a specific Mars/Saturn alignment.
requirements: Mars and Saturn in favorable alignment

spells.name: Solar Gaze
spells.cost_mp_formula: 8 MP minimum; higher investment increases the intensity of the focused sunlight.
spells.effect: Thickens air to form a lens that fries the target's flesh with focused sun rays.

spells.name: Soul Extraction
spells.effect: Lengthy ceremony to hide a soul or spirit within a clay pot for protection.

spells.name: Spell that was Lost with Ib, The
spells.effect: Turns a target into a SIZ-equivalent broken-legged spider.

spells.name: Steal Life
spells.effect: Caster drains characteristics from the target to become one day younger per point drained.

spells.name: Stop Heart
spells.effect: Caster triggers a massive heart attack in the target after 1 day of preparation.
requirements: 1 day of purging and preparation before casting

spells.name: Swelling Torment
spells.cost_mp_formula: 3 MP minimum; expands target's brain tissue; scales with MP invested.
spells.effect: Expands the target's brain tissue, causing incapacitating pain and 1D3 damage.

spells.name: Telepathy
spells.effect: Non-verbally communicate one-way with up to three nearby people.

spells.name: Time Trap
spells.effect: Transports a creature through time to the caster using human blood.

spells.name: Touch of Decay
spells.cost_mp_formula: Each MP invested = 10 years of aging applied to inanimate objects.
spells.effect: Hand glows green to rapidly age inanimate objects (10 years per MP).

spells.name: Utterance of Bile
spells.effect: Curse causing the target to vomit green-black bile for 1D4+1 rounds.

spells.name: Venomous Glance
spells.cost_mp_formula: 5 MP = Mild poison (1D10 damage); 10 MP = Strong poison (2D10 damage); 20 MP = Lethal poison (4D10 damage).
spells.effect: Target suffers as if bitten by a snake. Severity determined by MP spent.

spells.name: Warding the Eye
spells.effect: Complicated gestures protect one person from the Evil Eye until midnight.
requirements: Must be cast before midnight; protection ends at midnight

spells.name: Wither Limb
spells.effect: An appendage rapidly shrivels, dealing 1D8 damage and permanent CON loss.

spells.name: Woeful Itch
spells.effect: Target falls into a scratching frenzy, tearing at their own flesh.

spells.name: Words of Power
spells.cost_mp_formula: 3 MP minimum; higher investment affects more listeners or creates stronger belief.
spells.effect: Speech that creates a powerful bond, causing a group to believe what is said.

spells.name: Wrath of Ages
spells.effect: Unleashes a devastating assault. Costs 10 MP, 1D6 SAN, and 1 hit point from the caster.
requirements: Costs the caster 1 hit point in addition to MP and SAN

spells.name: Wrath of Pazzuzu
spells.effect: Sends a bolt of energy up to 100 yards dealing 1D6 damage.

spells.name: Yellow Spirit-Leap Seal
spells.cost_mp_formula: 4 MP minimum; higher investment creates a stronger barrier.
spells.effect: Creates a barrier that repels wild animals and Earthly supernatural entities.
